results.releaseNotes:
Some days, we like to come here just to remind you to straighten your back, stay hydrated, read the disclaimers, and update your Groww app. 

These regular updates help keep the bugs away and thus enhance your investing journey. 

So hit that update button and enjoy an improved experience. 

Note: Our updates are rolled out gradually.
results.description:
Groww is India's No.1 Stock Broker, trusted by 4 Crore+ Indians. Open a free demat account and start investing & trading.


Groww is your one app to invest & trade in:

• Stocks

• Mutual Funds

• Futures and Options Trading (F&O)

• Gold and Silver

• Margin Trading Facility (MTF)

• Commodity Derivatives: Gold, Silver, Crude Oil, Natural Gas and more

• Exchange Traded Funds (ETFs)

• IPO

• Bonds

• API Trading

• UPI Payments


Reasons why Indians love investing on Groww

• Free demat account (Individual, HUF, Corporate)

• 0 AMC & no hidden charges

• 24*7 customer support


Stocks, ETFs, IPO, MTF & Intraday Trading

• Open a free demat & trading account in minutes

• Buy & Sell stocks listed on NSE & BSE stock exchanges

• Boost trades with up to 5X leverage on Intraday Trading

• Never miss any corporate actions like splits, dividends, bonus etc.

• Buy up to 4X more stocks with MTF (Margin Trading Facility)

• Explore fundamentals & financials of stocks like Angel One, 5Paisa Capital, Meesho, ICICI Pru, Vodafone Idea etc.

• Apply for upcoming stock market IPOs

• Add money via UPI options like Gpay & PhonePe, Net banking & more

• Trade using TradingView’s advanced charts

• Set alerts to track stock price movements for trading & investing decisions

• Trade smarter with Intraday Screener

• Set Target & Stoploss both with OCO order for Intraday Trading

• Get insights on your investing or trading portfolio’s performance, allocation, risk, dividends & XIRR with Portfolio Analysis


Mutual Funds Investing

• Invest in direct mutual funds with 0% commission

• Estimate portfolio returns with SIP calculator

• Track all your Mutual Funds investments in ONE place - Import & Redeem external funds easily

• Save tax up to Rs.46,800 with Tax Saving Mutual Funds (ELSS funds)

• Invest money via SIP or lumpsum in Mutual Funds offered by AMCs like Zerodha, SBI, Quant, Parag Parikh, Bandhan, HDFC, Motilal Oswal, Axis, ICICI Mutual Fund etc.

• Switch from one fund to another within the same fund house, without having to redeem it.


Futures & Options Trading (F&O)

• Track Indian & Global Indices like Nifty, Sensex, Nasdaq, Gift Nifty, Nifty Midcap, Nifty Next 50 etc to make informed trading calls

• Trade better in Futures & Options with Safe Exit, Advanced Option Chain, Instant Pledge etc

• Use advanced charts to invest smarter & make informed futures & options trading calls

• Super-fast Options Trading with multiple indicators & live portfolio overview

• Place Basket Orders with convenience during option trading

• Test your strategy with Payoff Graph & trade with confidence in futures & options

• Exit your F&O positions instantly in a click with Fast Exit


Commodity Derivatives Trading

• Trade in Gold, Silver, Crude Oil, Natural Gas, Zinc, Aluminium & Copper

• Trades executed in under 0.05 seconds for a smooth experience

• Pledge your stock holdings to boost your margin and take larger positions


Personal Loans

• Tenure: 3 to 60 months

• APR: 13-36%


Registered NBFCs & Banks (lenders)

• IDFC First Bank Ltd

• Aditya Birla Finance Ltd

• Kisetsu Saison Finance (India) Pvt Ltd

• Groww Creditserv Technology Pvt Ltd

Groww is the DLA for the above lenders operating the Groww platform & services therein with assistance from other LSPs
